XIN_ENG_20061128.0468 BOGOTA , Nov. 28 , 2006 ( Xinhua ) Gold mine collapse traps 15 miners in Colombia A gold mine collapse in northern Colombia on Tuesday trapped 15 miners , rescue workers told media .
